nasb.text: Hamath, Berothah, Sibraim, which is between the border of Damascus and the border of Hamath; Hazer-hatticon, which is by the border of Hauran.

esv.text: Berothah, Sibraim (which lies on the border between Damascus and Hamath), as far as Hazer-hatticon, which is on the border of Hauran.

cnv.text: 又經哈馬、比羅他和位於大馬士革邊界與哈馬邊界之間的西伯蓮，直到浩蘭的邊界的哈撒．哈提干。

ccb.text: 比罗他和大马士革与哈马边界中间的西伯莲，一直到浩兰边界的哈撒·哈提干。
